title: dolichos racemosus
intro: Dolichos racemosus, also known as the horse gram or kollu, is a leguminous plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, managing diabetes, and aiding in weight loss, due to its high protein and fiber content. Dolichos racemosus can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and powder, which are commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and digestive health.
